name: galaxy-boss-ladder
description: Jump to all 5 boss levels (5=Crabtron, 10=Serpentrix, 15=Orbital Colossus, 19=Lieutenant, 20=Emperor) with screenshots and game state at each

args.expression: (function(){ if(window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL){ window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL(5); return 'jumped to LV5 Crabtron'; } return 'no debug hook'; })()

(function(){ return { level: typeof level !== 'undefined' ? level : '?', state: typeof state !== 'undefined' ? state : '?', bossActive: typeof boss !== 'undefined' && boss ? boss.active : '?', enemies: typeof enemies !== 'undefined' ? enemies.length : '?', score: typeof score !== 'undefined' ? score : '?' }; })()
(function(){ if(window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL){ window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL(10); return 'jumped to LV10 Serpentrix'; } return 'no debug hook'; })()
(function(){ return { level: typeof level !== 'undefined' ? level : '?', state: typeof state !== 'undefined' ? state : '?', bossActive: typeof boss !== 'undefined' && boss ? boss.active : '?' }; })()
(function(){ if(window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL){ window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL(15); return 'jumped to LV15 Orbital Colossus'; } return 'no debug hook'; })()
(function(){ if(window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL){ window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL(19); return 'jumped to LV19 Lieutenant'; } return 'no debug hook'; })()
(function(){ return { level: typeof level !== 'undefined' ? level : '?', bossActive: typeof boss !== 'undefined' && boss ? boss.active : '?' }; })()
(function(){ if(window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL){ window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL(20); return 'jumped to LV20 Emperor'; } return 'no debug hook'; })()

(function(){ return { level: typeof level !== 'undefined' ? level : '?', state: typeof state !== 'undefined' ? state : '?', bossActive: typeof boss !== 'undefined' && boss ? boss.active : '?', score: typeof score !== 'undefined' ? score : '?' }; })()
